storyAcceptanceCriteria: User can browse available phones in the store
User can select a phone to purchase
User can add the selected phone to a cart
User can complete the purchase of the phone
User receives confirmation after successful purchase

testCases.title: Successfully purchase a phone from end to end
preconditions: User has a valid registered account
At least one phone product is available in the store
User has a valid payment method saved or available to enter
Shopping cart is empty before starting
steps: 2. Click on the 'Phones' or relevant product category section
3. Verify a list of available phones is displayed
4. Click on a phone product to open its detail page
5. Verify the phone name, price, and description are displayed
6. Click the 'Add to Cart' or 'Buy Now' button
7. Verify the phone is added to the cart and cart item count updates
9. Verify the selected phone appears in the cart with correct name, quantity, and price
11. Verify the order summary shows the correct phone and total price
12. Enter or confirm shipping address details
13. Enter or select a valid payment method
15. Verify a confirmation page or message is displayed with an order number
16. Verify a confirmation email is received at the registered email address
testCases.expectedResult: The phone is successfully purchased, an order confirmation page displays a unique order number, and a confirmation email is sent to the user's registered email address.
acceptanceCriteria: User can browse available phones in the store
User can select a phone to purchase
User can add the selected phone to a cart
User can complete the purchase of the phone
User receives confirmation after successful purchase
testCases.automationReason: This is a stable end-to-end happy path flow with deterministic UI interactions including navigation, button clicks, form inputs, and verifiable confirmation messages that are well-suited for Playwright automation.
